nasb.text: He said, “Behold, it is still high day; it is not time for the livestock to be gathered. Water the sheep, and go, pasture them.”

esv.text: He said, “Behold, it is still high day; it is not time for the livestock to be gathered together. Water the sheep and go, pasture them.”

cnv.text: 雅各說：“現在太陽還高，不是牲畜聚集的時候；你們取水給羊群喝，再去牧放吧。”

ccb.text: 雅各对他们说：“太阳还高，不到把羊关起来的时候，你们饮了羊，再放它们去吃草吧！”

csbs.text: 雅各说：“看哪，现在日头还高，不是聚拢牲畜的时候。你们给羊群饮了水就去放牧吧！”
